user.title: HA Metadata Exporter
user.description:
This integration exports Home Assistant metadata (entities, services, devices, and areas) for editor tooling.

Notification helpers are optional.

data_description.notifications: Optionally creates input_text.notification_title / notification_body and input_select.notification_severity for display notifications
data_description.default_severity: Alert level used when no severity is specified

data_description.default_timeout: How long notifications display by default before auto-closing (0 = manual dismiss only)
